name: Training Session
description: Behind-the-scenes content from first-team training sessions. Gives fans exclusive access to the daily preparation and tactical work.
guidelines: 30-60 second Reel mixing wide training shots with close-up skill moments. Include rondo circles, shooting drills, tactical exercises, and casual moments. Use trending music. Minimal text overlay — let the footage speak. Slow-motion for spectacular goals or skills. Show the intensity and professionalism. Avoid filming tactical board sessions or sensitive tactical information.
